descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Keyflare. Place the temporary copies of the last 3 different non-Derived Command Cards played in the previous turn into your hand, with -1 Arithmetica Cost, {Exhaust}, {Fleeting}. If there are not enough Command Cards to place into your hand, draw a card for each Command Card missing.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Keyflare. Place the temporary copies of the last 3 different non-Derived Command Cards played in the previous turn into your hand, with -1 Arithmetica Cost, {Exhaust}, {Fleeting}. If there are not enough Command Cards to place into your hand, draw a card for each Command Card missing. Choose 1 unlocked Posse to replace your current Posse. Your current Posse will be restored after using a Posse or at the End of Battle.
